findings.problem: The reopened working pass confirmed the `07-current-progress.md` closure claim repair and the working attempts' `verifier_output_path` repair, but the standalone run still has a remaining guard-blocking artifact issue: `challenger/attempt-1/spawn-decision.json` records `evidence.source_review.findings_path` and `verifier_evidence_path` as repository-root paths instead of run-dir-relative paths.
findings.evidence: `new/docs/race-finish-series.zh-CN/07-current-progress.md:48-70` and `:114-120` now correctly scope challenger-confirmed closure to the `2026-04-14` baseline and mark the `2026-04-15` `old_2` integration as still pending standalone closure. `review/review-runs/race-finish-series-old2-doc-integration-2026-04-15/working/attempt-1/verifier-evidence.json:14` and `working/attempt-2/verifier-evidence.json:14` now use run-dir-relative `verifier_output_path` values. But `review/review-runs/race-finish-series-old2-doc-integration-2026-04-15/challenger/attempt-1/spawn-decision.json:17-18` still stores `review/review-runs/.../working/attempt-2/findings.json` and `.../verifier-evidence.json` rather than `working/attempt-2/findings.json` and `working/attempt-2/verifier-evidence.json`. The guard explicitly checks these fields by resolving them relative to the run dir in `openspec/schemas/modules/review-loop/bin/review_loop_guard.py:562-566`, so the current challenger spawn artifact still mismatches the expected working baseline reference.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite `challenger/attempt-1/spawn-decision.json` so `evidence.source_review.findings_path` is `working/attempt-2/findings.json` and `evidence.source_review.verifier_evidence_path` is `working/attempt-2/verifier-evidence.json`, then rerun the reopened working pass.
